title: Parent-Teacher Meeting 家长会
scene: 家长会后，老师向家长反馈学生的在校表现。

lines.en: Thank you for coming to the parent-teacher meeting today.
lines.zh: 感谢您今天来参加家长会。

lines.en: Thank you, Ms. Wang. How is Tom doing at school?
lines.zh: 谢谢您，王老师。汤姆在学校表现怎么样？

lines.en: Tom is a very good student. He works hard in class.
lines.zh: 汤姆是个很好的学生。他上课很努力。

lines.en: I'm glad to hear that. Is there anything he needs to improve?
lines.zh: 听到这个我很高兴。他有什么需要改进的吗？

lines.en: He could practice speaking English more. He is a bit shy.
lines.zh: 他可以多练习说英语。他有点害羞。

lines.en: Yes, he is shy at home too. I'll encourage him to speak more.
lines.zh: 是的，他在家也害羞。我会鼓励他多说的。

lines.en: Also, he should read more English storybooks.
lines.zh: 还有，他应该多读英语故事书。

lines.en: I'll buy some for him. Thank you for your advice.
lines.zh: 我会给他买一些。谢谢您的建议。

lines.en: You're welcome. Tom is a wonderful boy. I'm proud of him.
lines.zh: 不客气。汤姆是个很棒的男孩。我为他感到骄傲。

lines.en: Thank you, Ms. Wang. We'll keep working hard!
lines.zh: 谢谢您，王老师。我们会继续努力的！
